title: secretx-local-signing: implement LocalSigningBackend for file/env keys
description: The spec states: for the LocalKey backend (key loaded from file or env), a LocalSigningBackend wraps ed25519-dalek and implements SigningBackend so call sites are identical regardless of whether the key is local or in an HSM. Create a new crate secretx-local-signing. It reads a private key from a secretx://file/ or secretx://env/ URI, loads it with ed25519-dalek (or a broader key parsing library for P-256 and RSA-PSS support), and implements SigningBackend. Key material is held in a SecretValue (zeroed on drop). Supported algorithms must match SigningAlgorithm: Ed25519, EcdsaP256Sha256, RsaPss2048Sha256. Also add secretx-local-signing to the workspace Cargo.toml members list and add a corresponding feature to the secretx umbrella.
